{
  "executive_summary": "The courier assignment system has a fundamental tension between strong consistency (no double-assignment) and high availability (survive DB node failure), which is a textbook CAP theorem conflict. For a 2-engineer team, the architecture must be ruthlessly simple. I recommend a single-writer pattern with a PostgreSQL primary + synchronous standby, using SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED for atomic courier claiming. This prioritizes consistency (CP) while achieving practical
